title: [FIRRTL] infer width (tail, constant) (core dump)
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    wire tmp74: UInt
    tmp74 <= tail(UInt("b11101001111100"), 15)
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following core dump:

```
firtool: ../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/InferWidths.cpp:1284: bool {anonymous}::InferenceTypeUpdate::updateValue(mlir::Value): Assertion `solution >= 0' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://bugs.llvm.org/ and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: ../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --imconstprop --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --mlir-timing --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v
1.       #0 0x0000000000485b6d llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x485b6d)
 #1 0x00000000004839a4 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x4839a4)
 #2 0x0000000000483b03 SignalHandler(int) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x483b03)

 #7 0x0000000004ca59d6 (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x359d6)
 #8 0x00000000005b8c48 (anonymous namespace)::InferenceTypeUpdate::updateValue(mlir::Value) /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/InferWidths.cpp:1287:28
 #9 0x00000000005b7ffb (anonymous namespace)::InferenceTypeUpdate::updateOperation(mlir::Operation*) /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/InferWidths.cpp:1167:16
#10 0x00000000005b7ed0 (anonymous namespace)::InferenceTypeUpdate::update(circt::firrtl::CircuitOp)::'lambda'(mlir::Operation*)::operator()(mlir::Operation*) const /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/InferWidths.cpp:1157:20
#11 0x00000000005c91d3 mlir::WalkResult llvm::function_ref<mlir::WalkResult (mlir::Operation*)>::callback_fn<(anonymous namespace)::InferenceTypeUpdate::update(circt::firrtl::CircuitOp)::'lambda'(mlir::Operation*)>(long, mlir::Operation*) /home/drom/work/github/llvm/circt/build/../llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/STLExtras.h:179:3

#26 0x000000000099ee3d mlir::PassManager::run(mlir::Operation*) (../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x99ee3d)

#30 0x0000000004c97b35 __libc_start_main (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x27b35)
#31 0x000000000040c0de _start /home/abuild/rpmbuild/BUILD/glibc-2.33/csu/../sysdeps/x86_64/start.S:122:0
./process1.sh: line 16:  1430 Aborted                 (core dumped) valgrind -q ../../llvm/circt/build/bin/firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --imconstprop --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --mlir-timing --verilog -o=$VFILE2
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Error:

```
Exception in thread "main" firrtl.passes.CheckWidths$TailWidthException: : [target ~top_mod|top_mod] Parameter 15 in tail operator is larger than input width 14.
```
